creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 160590
Revised source for x11-themes/gnome-icons-blank-on

This is technically a "revived" port.
As such, I used PORTREVISION. But was instructed (by junovitch@)
to remove this line, in another similar port. So I've also done so
here. I also removed an unused macro (RESTRICTED) in the source.

Thanks!

--Chris
